# 12 Small-Business Grants to Apply for in 2026

These business grant programs won’t cost your company any equity—but deadlines are approaching fast.

BY [BRIAN CONTRERAS](https://www.inc.com/author/brian-contreras), STAFF WRITER [@\_B\_CONTRERAS\_](https://x.com/_B_Contreras_)

Jan 22, 2026

SHARE

LinkedInFacebookXBlueskyLink

ADD ON GOOGLE

![](https://img-cdn.inc.com/image/upload/f_webp,c_fit,w_1920,q_auto/vip/2026/01/government-grants-inc.jpg)

Photos: Getty Images

Listen to this Article [More info](https://www.inc.com/about/index.html#voice)

0:00 / 0:00

If you run a business, you already know how important capital is for keeping things running smoothly and scaling up. But getting new liquidity through a venture capital raise or private equity deal always comes with strings attached—mainly on your cap table or in your boardroom.

That’s why [so many entrepreneurs love grants](https://www.inc.com/brian-contreras/small-business-grants-applications-funding-investors-raising-capital/91197012), which offer a typically non-dilutive cash source you can plug straight into your growing enterprise. As we start off the new year, here are 12 exciting grant opportunities, for which your business might be eligible.

( [Want to craft the perfect grant application? Click here for Inc.’s guide to being competitive in your pursuit of this more or less free money.](https://www.inc.com/brian-contreras/small-business-grant-money-tips-on-how-to-craft-perfect-application/91227073))

## Amber Grant for Women

WomensNet, an entrepreneurial network for women, gives away [at least $30,000 every month](https://ambergrantsforwomen.com/get-an-amber-grant/) in honor of Amber Wigdahl, a 19-year-old who passed away before achieving her entrepreneurship dreams. WomensNet also offers more specific grants for [startups](https://www.inc.com/startup "Startup") and specific business categories as well as three $50,000 end-of-year grants. Winners are announced by the 21st of a given month, with the next application period ending on January 31. One application can enter you for all relevant business grants.

## Amex Shop Small Grants Program

Offered in partnership with American Express, [this grant program](https://mainstreet.org/about/partner-collaborations/amex-shop-small-grant-program) offers over 500 grants worth $20,000—that is, more than $10 million in grants total—targeted at small brick-and-mortar businesses aiming to support their local community, and which have 20 or fewer full-time equivalent employees. Applicants are encouraged to prepare a specific project plan with an itemized budget. Applications close Friday, January 23, at 11:59 p.m. CT.

## Breva Thrive Grant

This program by the small business coaching, funding and risk monitoring company Breva offers a [$5,000 small business grant](https://www.breva.ai/thrive-grant) every quarter to “an entrepreneur who is having a positive impact in an underrepresented community.” Applicants must have demonstrated that impact through something like job creation, product innovation or improved accessibility.

## Freed Fellowship Grant

The Freed Fellowship offers a [$2,500 small business grant](https://freedfellowship.com/grant) that comes with business feedback and two months of mentorship. Additionally, the program offers monthly $500 Freed Fellow grants to American business owners, with no strings attached and no equity lost.
